product_name: Gyeon Q²m Baldwipe Evo Lazer Kesim Tüysüz Çok Amaçlı Mikrofiber Bez - 40X40 cm

sources.cleaned_content:
Q2M BALDWIPE EVO

Interior / Accessories

Low pile meets high performance. The all-rounder among microfibres.

The low-pile, edgeless Q²M BaldWipe EVO is gentle yet very effective. It is equally effective for cleaning, polishing, or maintaining a vehicle. It removes the remnants of polishing pastes without leaving marks or light scratches: an utterly new microfibre weave and a higher GSM than before increase softness and absorbency. Ultrasonic cutting provides a precise and safe edgeless finish.

Product Image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_baldwipe-1024x991.jpg

TECHNICAL DETAILS

SIZES: 40x40 cm

HOW TO USE

01. Use on clean and dry surfaces.
02. Wipe gently to remove coating or product residue.
03. Turn the towel frequently to a clean side.
04. Avoid excessive pressure during wipe off.
05. Wash after use to maintain fibre performance.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

01. What is BALDWIPE EVO best used for?
Coating removal, inspection and final wipe downs.

02. Why is a short nap important?
It prevents residue masking and improves control.

03. Is it safe on soft paint?
Yes, when used gently on clean surfaces.

04. Can it be reused?
Yes, with proper washing and care.

05. How should it be maintained?
Machine wash up to 30°C. Do not tumble dry, iron or bleach.

This short fibre, edgeless towel is ideally suited to removing polish residue. It's a dextrous, easy-to-handle towel that removes reside with ease and without leaving behind any further marks. The Gyeon Q2M Bald Wipe microfibre towel can also be used for interior details.

sources.page_title: Gyeon BaldWipe Evo Microfiber - 16" x 16" - Detailed Image
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon BaldWipe Evo Microfiber - 16" x 16"

Product Image: https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-BaldWipe-Evo-Microfiber-16-x-16_1430_1_lw_3522.jpg

Price: $6.99

Quantity Discounts: 10+ units at $6.29 (10% off)

Available Sizes: 16" x 16" - $6.99

Product Information:
- Low nap microfiber towel, great for removing residue from the surface
- Removes wax, polish, coating, sealant residue with ease
- 80/20 polyester and polyamide blend
- Edgeless laser cut design
- Product Code: GY-6300

Product Description:
The Gyeon BaldWipe Evo Microfiber is a low nap microfiber towel, ideal for removing residue from your favorite polish, wax, sealant, or coating. When you apply any product that requires residue removal you almost always need more than one. One towel will become saturated in product quickly, which can cause streaking and/or marring. To maximize your towels performance use a towel specifically designed for the safe removal of excess products like the BaldWipe! This towel measures 16" x 16" and is made of an 80/20 polyester and polyamide blend. This blend provides you with an extremely soft towel, that will help you remove residue with ease. The nap is also very low, helping you remove more tightly bonded residue with ease. The edges of this towel are laser cut, giving you an minimalist edgeless design. There are no tags, stitching, or edging that you need to be aware of to avoid marring. Gyeon recommend keeping a few of these towels on hand to help you remove any of their coatings and for use with their various other products. Pick up a few Gyeon BaldWipe Evo Microfiber towels today, thank us tomorrow!

From The Label - Product Description:
The low pile, edgeless Q2M BaldWipe Evo is gentle yet very effective. It meets various applications, being equally effective during cleaning, polishing or maintaining a vehicle. It removes the remains of polishing pastes easily, without leaving marks or light scratches. Completely new weaving of the microfibre and higher than before GSM increases softness and absorbency. Ultrasonic cut provides a precise and safe edgeless finish. Wash with Q2M TowelWash regularly.

Customer Reviews:
100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 2 ratings)

Reviewed by Jon G. on 5/9/2024 (DI Verified Purchase):
Would they buy this item again? Yes
I purchased this for leveling a Gyeon MOHS coating and it was a pleasure to work with. Packaged nicely and of very nice quality.

Reviewed by Ronnie M. on 8/22/2020 (DI Verified Purchase):
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Removes all compounds with ease

sources.page_title: GYEON Q2M Baldwipe EVO 16"x16" Polish Removal & Coating Leveling Towel - Car Supplies Warehouse
sources.cleaned_content:
GYEON Q2M Baldwipe EVO 16"x16" Polish Removal & Coating Leveling Towel

Brand: Gyeon
SKU: GY-1381

Product Images:
- https://www.carsupplieswarehouse.com/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-q2m-baldwipe-evo-16x16-polish-removal-and-coating-leveling-towel-184171.jpg?v=1734224325
- https://www.carsupplieswarehouse.com/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-q2m-baldwipe-evo-16x16-polish-removal-and-coating-leveling-towel-441318.jpg?v=1734224327

Regular price: $6.99

Quantity options: Single, 5-Pack

EDGELESS AND EXTREMELY SAFE

The short fiber, edgeless Q²M BaldWipe EVO towel is a gentle yet very effective towel. It suits many different applications, being equally as good whether it comes to wiping off coatings, applying Q²M Cure or cleansing the paint with Q²M Tar as it is when used with Q²M Prep. It removes the rest of the polishing pastes, without leaving marks or light scratches easily. Q²M BaldWipe can also be used as a universal microfiber for interior detailing.

MAINTENANCE DIRECTIONS: Machine wash on cold, maximum 30°C. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron. Do not bleach.

Gyeon Q²M Bald Wipe EVO - An ultra-soft, edgeless microfiber towel ideal for removing coatings, polishes, and residues safely, leaving a flawless finish.

Description:
It is equally as good at wiping off coatings, applying Q²M Cure, cleansing the paint with Q²M Tar or when used with Q²M Prep. Removes polishing residue without leaving marks or light scratches.

Can also be used as a universal microfiber for interior detailing. The towel's edges are fabricated using the most advanced laser-cutting technology.

How to use Gyeon Q²M Bald Wipe EVO:
- Gently wipe away polish, coating or wax residue using smooth overlapping motions
- Rotate to a clean side as the towel becomes saturated with residue
